INSERT INTO test_utf8 VALUES ('\xc3\xb1'), ('\xc3\x28'), ('valid string'), ('invalid string \xc3\x28'), ('\xe2\x9c\x94'), ('\x80'), ('\xFF'), ('\xC2\xA1'), ('\xe2\x82\xac'), ('');
SELECT isValidUTF8(input) AS validity FROM test_utf8;
SELECT isValidUTF8(input) AS validity, input FROM test_utf8 WHERE input LIKE '\%\xC3\%';
SELECT COUNT(*) as valid_count FROM test_utf8 WHERE isValidUTF8(input) = 1;
SELECT input FROM test_utf8 WHERE isValidUTF8(input) = 0 ORDER BY input;
SELECT CASE WHEN isValidUTF8(input) = 1 THEN 'Valid' ELSE 'Invalid' END AS result FROM test_utf8;
CREATE TABLE test_utf8_nested AS SELECT input, isValidUTF8(input) AS validity FROM (SELECT '\xc3\xb1' AS input UNION ALL SELECT '\xc3\x28' AS input UNION ALL SELECT 'another valid string' AS input);
SELECT nested.validity, nested.input FROM (SELECT input, isValidUTF8(input) AS validity FROM test_utf8 WHERE input IS NOT NULL) AS nested WHERE validity = 1;
SELECT a.input, b.validity FROM test_utf8 AS a JOIN (SELECT input, isValidUTF8(input) as validity FROM test_utf8) AS b ON a.input = b.input WHERE b.validity = 1;
WITH (SELECT input FROM test_utf8) AS input_values SELECT input, isValidUTF8(input) AS validity FROM input_values WHERE input <> '';
